# QA Nexus PM1 — Project Specification

**Generated by:** Tech-project-forge-skill v1.4 Phase 1 PLAN
**Source of truth (BINDING):** [QA Nexus/PM1/PM1_PRD/PM1_PRD.md](../QA Nexus/PM1/PM1_PRD/PM1_PRD.md) v8.1 + [QA Nexus/PM1/PM1_ERD/PM1_ERD.md](../QA Nexus/PM1/PM1_ERD/PM1_ERD.md) v2.1
**Scope:** This document is a build-team-facing summary derived from the binding specs. **When this doc and the binding specs disagree, the binding specs win.** Conflict priority: PM1_PRD > PM1_ERD > M0_v8 > 01_SYSTEM > this doc.

---

## PART A — PRODUCT REQUIREMENTS

### 1. Project Overview

QA Nexus is an **AI-native QA management platform** for Iksula Services Pvt Ltd. PM1 (= MVP = v1 GA, 2026-09-21) collapses the QA team's 8–10 daily tools (Jira, TestRail, Confluence, Excel, Slack, GitHub) into one workspace where 8 internal Iksula users plan, author, execute, triage, and report — with 3 AI agents (A1 Test Case Generator, A2 Duplicate Detection, A4 Defect 5-Layer RCA) handling mechanical work. Phase 1 of a 4-phase program (PM1 → PM2 v1.5 → PM3 v2 → PM4 SaaS).

### 2. Target Users and Personas

**Pilot team (8 named users, final — see [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) Iksula data canon):**

- **Akshay Panchal** — QA Lead (RBAC: Lead) · approves test plans, signs off on releases
- **Yogesh Mohite** — Sr QA (RBAC: Admin / deployer-admin per Day-0 bootstrap) · workspace governance, F28m1 LLM provider config, F26m1 agent model assignment
- **Kishor Kadam, Nitin Gomle, Nadim Siddiqui, Govind Daware, Mohanraj K., Sagar Todankar** — QA Engineers (RBAC: QA Engineer) · author cases, run tests, triage defects

**Persona scaffolding (PM1_PRD §6):** L1 Junior QA · L2 Senior QA · L3 QA Lead · L4-L5 QA Head/VP · Stakeholder · Test Automation Engineer · Product Manager.

### 3. Core Features (organized by milestone)

**M0 (Day 1–10) — Infrastructure:** Auth shell, deploy pipeline, no user-facing functionality yet. **+ MS0-T032 (added per R3 mitigation, Days 7–10 parallel):** Build A1/A2/A4 golden-set seed (20 RET reqs hand-graded → A1; 50 known-duplicate defect pairs from CART/RET → A2; 50 historical defects with manually-classified RCA layers → A4). Owners: Yogesh + Akshay. ~16h. Drives weekly DeepEval starting M3. **+ R1 mitigation in MS0-T019:** wire Better Stack alert to fire if UptimeRobot ping is missed for >10 min.
**M1 — Users & Roles:** 4-role RBAC (Admin/Lead/QA Engineer/Stakeholder), Postgres RLS, magic link invites, F06/F06b/F06c/F07/F07b/F07c/F07d/F27/F27m1.
**M2 — Docs + KB:** Document Catalog (12 templates), KB with `@xenova/transformers` embeddings (Qwen3-0.6B, 1024-dim), F12/F13/F14/F14m1/F15.
**M3 — Test Cases + A1 + A2:** TipTap editor (BDD + traditional), A1 generation via Groq (Clarification Questions gate), A2 dedup live chips, RTM, bulk import, F16a/F16b/F16c/F17/F18/F18m1.
**M4 — Runs + Defects + Jira + A4:** Test runs (live state, WebSocket), defects with A4 5-Layer RCA (L1 Stack 90% → L5 Data 40%), Jira OAuth 2.0 3LO 2-way sync, F19/F20/F21/F22.
**M5 — Reports + Pilot Launch:** Reports Studio (4 templates, hand-crafted SVG), F23, F25 Executive Dashboard (Prove mode ivory canvas), F24 QA Value Dashboard, F26 Agents, F26m1 Agent Model Assignment, F28 Settings + 6 GA tabs, F28m1 LLM Provider Configuration. **Pilot Day-0 = F28m1 + F26m1 setup flow** (Yogesh signs in → paste Groq key → Test connection → enable models → Save → F26m1 per-agent assignment → first A1 generation works).
**M6 — GA (2026-09-21):** All 41 frames at GA, all 12 PM1_ERD §10 acceptance gates pass.

**Functional reqs:** FR-001..FR-062 (PM1 ships); FR-063/064 deferred to PM3 M17 (PAT/custom OAuth Jira auth).

### 4. User Flows (W-001..W-008)

**W-001 (canonical):** QA uploads PRD → A1 asks clarification questions → answers via form (or KB defaults) → A1 generates 5–20 BDD+traditional cases in <30s, tagged + prioritized + confidence-scored → A2 shows live duplicate chips ("Similar to TC-RET-123 (92% match)") → QA dismisses or merges → ≥80% auto-approved at confidence ≥80%, 70–89% review, <70% blocked → email to Lead for sign-off.
**W-008:** Defect dedup via A2 vector search (≥60% TP, <5% FP).
**Other workflows:** test run execution, defect → Jira sync, A4 RCA, KB search, report generation.

### 5. UI/UX Requirements

**41 LOCKED HTML frames** in PM1_UI_v2 (17 + 24, NEVER MODIFY, only translate to React in apps/web/src/app/**).
**Design system:** [QA Nexus/PM1/PM1_UI_v2/UI Files/01_SYSTEM.md](../QA Nexus/PM1/PM1_UI_v2/UI Files/01_SYSTEM.md). Hardcoded tokens (canvas/base/raised/overlay), typography (Inter/DM Sans/Geist Mono/JetBrains Mono — 4 stacks ONLY).
**Anti-drift binding:** teal `#2DD4BF` = system actions ONLY (Save/Approve/Generate/+Add); violet `#A78BFA` = AI surfaces ONLY (agent labels, confidence lane, AI badges). Save NEVER violet. NO MD3 tokens, NO tertiary color, NO orange, NO Tailwind config color extend.
**Nav contract FROZEN:\*\* 8-slot top bar (56px) + 6-section left rail (272/88px). Modal canon: Stage 1120×860, Edit 960×720, Picker 720×640, Confirm 480×360.

### 6. Success Criteria per Milestone

M0 exit: 19 MS0-AC criteria pass (CF Pages live + F06 renders, /health green, 21 tables w/ HNSW, R2 + presigned upload, BetterAuth, RBAC, Groq→Gemini fallback, embedding <200ms, UptimeRobot active, CI green, auto-deploy, weekly backup, OTel→Grafana, Better Stack→Slack alert, $0 confirmed, docs complete, keys in env only, audit chain integrity, Playwright smoke).
M1–M5 exits: per per-milestone files; M6 exit: 12 PM1_ERD §10 binding gates.

## PART B — ENGINEERING REQUIREMENTS

### 7. Tech Stack Table (LOCKED v8.1 — see CLAUDE.md for full list)

| Layer          | Component                                                  | Version          | Purpose                                                                         |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| FE Framework   | Next.js                                                    | 15 (App Router)  | RSC, useActionState, useFormStatus                                              |
| FE Runtime     | React                                                      | 19               | Concurrent + Suspense                                                           |
| FE Styling     | Tailwind CSS                                               | 4 (CSS-first)    | Smaller bundle, no extended config                                              |
| FE UI          | shadcn/ui + Sonner + lucide-react + Framer Motion + TipTap | latest           | WCAG 2.1 AA, locked tokens                                                      |
| FE Data        | TanStack Query v5 + react-hook-form + Zod                  | latest           | Server cache + form validation                                                  |
| BE Framework   | NestJS                                                     | 10               | Single service: REST + WebSocket via @nestjs/websockets + ws                    |
| BE ORM         | Prisma                                                     | 5                | Postgres adapter, type-safe                                                     |
| BE Auth        | BetterAuth                                                 | latest (MIT)     | Postgres adapter (NOT Redis), magic link via Resend, Jira OAuth 3LO             |
| BE Embeddings  | @xenova/transformers                                       | latest           | Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B (1024-dim), in-process WASM                                |
| BE LLM         | Groq SDK + @google/generative-ai                           | latest           | Direct API calls; hand-rolled gateway with primary→fallback retry               |
| DB             | PostgreSQL                                                 | 15               | Neon free 0.5 GB scale-to-zero                                                  |
| Vector         | pgvector + HNSW                                            | extension        | NO pgvectorscale (not on Neon free)                                             |
| Storage        | Cloudflare R2                                              | free             | Presigned-URL direct upload from FE                                             |
| Email          | Resend                                                     | free             | Magic links, notifications                                                      |
| LLM            | Groq + Gemini                                              | free APIs        | gpt-oss-120b primary, llama-4-scout long-ctx, gpt-oss-20b fast, Gemini fallback |
| Hosting FE     | Cloudflare Pages                                           | free             | Auto-deploy on push to main                                                     |
| Hosting BE     | Render                                                     | free Hobby       | UptimeRobot 5-min keep-alive                                                    |
| Obs            | OpenTelemetry SDK + Grafana Cloud + Better Stack           | free tiers       | Traces, metrics, logs, Slack alerts                                             |
| CI             | GitHub Actions                                             | free             | 2k min/mo, weekly pg_dump cron                                                  |
| Eval           | DeepEval on Colab Free                                     | engineering-only | Never blocks prod traffic                                                       |
| E2E            | Playwright                                                 | latest           | Internal QA dogfood                                                             |
| **Total cost** |                                                            |                  | **$0/month** for 8-user × 12hr/day pilot                                        |

### 8. Project Folder Structure (pnpm workspaces)

```
QA-Nexus/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/         # Next.js 15 frontend
│   │   ├── src/app/        # App Router routes (one per F## frame translation)
│   │   ├── src/components/ # shadcn/ui + custom
│   │   ├── src/lib/        # zod schemas (re-export from @qa-nexus/shared)
│   │   ├── tailwind.config.ts  # locked PM1 tokens ONLY
│   │   └── package.json
│   └── api/         # NestJS 10 backend
│       ├── src/modules/    # one module per CO-### component
│       ├── src/auth/       # BetterAuth setup
│       ├── src/llm/        # Gateway (primary→fallback)
│       ├── src/embeddings/ # @xenova service
│       ├── src/audit/      # HMAC chain
│       ├── prisma/schema.prisma  # TB-001..TB-021
│       └── package.json
├── packages/
│   └── shared/      # Zod schemas shared FE+BE
│       ├── src/schemas/  # one file per entity
│       └── package.json
├── .github/workflows/   # ci.yml + backup-cron.yml
├── .claude/             # hooks, settings, agents (already exist)
├── docs/                # this file + PROJECT_BLUEPRINT.md + MILESTONES.md + ARCHITECTURE.md
├── QA Nexus/            # binding specs (DO NOT modify; keep separate from build artifacts)
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── package.json         # root, with engines.node: "20.x"
├── .nvmrc               # "20"
├── .env.example         # template
├── CLAUDE.md            # binding context (already exists)
└── README.md
```

### 9. Database Schema (TB-001 through TB-021 — see PM1_ERD v2.1 §5 for full DDL)

**Core tables:** organizations, users, roles, projects, project_members, requirements, test_cases, test_runs, test_run_results, defects, kb_entries, agent_runs, audit_log, integrations, jira_status_map, document_templates, kb_chunks, kb_embeddings.
**LLM provider tables (added v2.1):** **TB-019 llm_provider** (provider_kind, api_key encrypted, endpoint_url) · **TB-020 llm_provider_model** (provider_id FK, model_id, capability_json, enabled_for_workspace) · **TB-021 agent_model_assignment** (workspace_id, agent_kind enum A1/A2/A4, role enum primary/long_context/fallback/fast_layer, model_pk FK).
**RLS:** all tables scoped by workspace_id; provider config visible to Admin only; agent assignments visible to Admin + Lead.
**Vector indexes:** HNSW on `kb_embeddings.embedding` (1024-dim from Qwen3-0.6B).
**Audit:** HMAC-SHA256 chained `audit_log` (every state-changing op writes one row; chain integrity verified at F28).

### 10. API Endpoint Table (29 endpoints EP-001..EP-029)

| Method       | Endpoint                   | Description                                    | Auth           |
| ------------ | -------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | -------------- |
| POST         | /auth/sign-up              | Magic link send                                | public         |
| GET          | /auth/callback             | Magic link verify                              | public         |
| GET/POST     | /projects                  | List/create projects                           | Lead+          |
| GET/POST/PUT | /requirements/:id          | CRUD requirements                              | QA+            |
| POST         | /test-cases/generate       | A1 generate from requirement                   | QA+            |
| POST         | /test-cases/dedup-check    | A2 live dedup                                  | QA+            |
| POST         | /test-runs                 | Start run                                      | QA+            |
| POST         | /defects                   | Create defect (auto-A4)                        | QA+            |
| POST         | /defects/:id/jira-sync     | Push to Jira                                   | QA+            |
| GET          | /kb/search                 | Semantic search                                | QA+            |
| GET          | /reports/:type             | Generate report                                | Lead+          |
| GET          | /audit-log                 | View audit chain                               | Lead+          |
| GET/POST     | /llm-providers             | List/create LLM providers (EP-026)             | **Admin only** |
| POST         | /llm-providers/:id/test    | Test connection (EP-027)                       | Admin only     |
| GET          | /llm-providers/:id/models  | Fetch + cache models from provider (EP-028)    | Admin only     |
| GET/PUT      | /agents/:kind/model-config | Read/write per-agent model assignment (EP-029) | Admin + Lead   |
| ...          |                            | (full table in PM1_ERD v2.1 §6)                |                |

### 11. Auth & Authz Approach

- **BetterAuth** Postgres adapter (sessions in DB, NOT Redis); magic link via Resend.
- **4-role RBAC:** Admin > Lead > QA Engineer > Stakeholder. Roles enforced via NestJS `@Roles()` decorator + Postgres RLS policies (defense-in-depth).
- **Jira OAuth 2.0 3LO** for integration (PM1 only). API Token / PAT / custom OAuth deferred to PM3 M17.
- **PII masking** in logs (regex + HuggingFace detector at PM1_PRD §20).
- **Encryption:** AES-256 at rest (Neon-managed), TLS 1.3 in transit.

### 12. Testing, Deployment, Integrations

**Testing strategy:** Playwright E2E for smoke (MS0-T031: load → sign in → land on F07); per-milestone unit tests via Jest; **DeepEval** golden sets for agents (A1 ≥80%, A2 <5% FP + ≥60% TP, A4 ≥70% top-2 RCA) — runs on Colab Free, never blocks prod.
**Deployment:** Push to `main` → GitHub Actions CI (lint + typecheck + test + build) → Cloudflare Pages auto-deploy FE + Render auto-deploy API. Weekly pg_dump cron uploads to R2 (MS0-T018). Restore drill in MS0-T012 + retest in M5.
**Integrations:** Jira (OAuth 3LO 2-way sync, webhook + poll), GitHub/GitLab (webhooks for repo events), Slack (outgoing webhook for alerts), Confluence (read for KB ingest), Figma (read for design context).
**Env vars:** `DATABASE_URL`, `GROQ_API_KEY`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`, `RESEND_API_KEY`, `R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID`, `R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`, `R2_BUCKET`, `BETTER_AUTH_SECRET`, `JIRA_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID`, `JIRA_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET`, `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT`, `BETTER_STACK_TOKEN`. All in Render env vars + GitHub Secrets; NEVER in repo.
